problem_statement: Need a fast way to validate prompt behavior using an Azure-hosted model in Sweden Central.
hypothesis: A minimal Azure OpenAI deployment plus a notebook is sufficient for early feasibility prompt testing.
customer_scenario: Architecture and engineering teams testing model viability for internal customer workflows.
data_requirements: No production data required; prompts can use synthetic examples.
security_notes: Non-production use only. Store secrets in local env or Key Vault; never commit credentials.
